mapper.insert: insert into kb_file (title, file_name, file_url, file_path, file_type, business_type, file_hash, file_size, status, segment_count, redis_prefix, error_message, remark, create_by) values (#{title}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{businessType}, #{fileHash}, #{fileSize}, #{status}, #{segmentCount}, #{redisPrefix}, #{errorMessage}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select * from kb_file where id = #{id} limit 1
select * from kb_file where file_hash = #{fileHash} limit 1
